backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the blog platform backend with types for BlogPost, UserProfile, and images, plus CRUD operations for posts and profiles with role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the admin panel React Query hook was fixed to call `getAllPosts()` so it fetches all blog posts including unpublished drafts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens, plus base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets SPA, setting metadata, theme color, and mounting the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes (public, admin, category sub-pages), React Query client, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component for admin routes that renders its children directly without any access guard logic.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sticky blog sidebar with a search widget (using `useRemedySearch`), popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category count breakdown.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a visually prominent featured blog post card with an overlay image, metadata (author, date, read time), and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, category links, and social media icons for the AyurGlow Secrets blog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes the Navigation and Footer around a flex-growing main content area.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with a logo, desktop category dropdown, page links, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a blog post summary card with a thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input component with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that navigates to the selected result's route on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts (fetch published, all, by ID, by slug, create, update), wiring them to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook that filters a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages by title, category, or keywords based on a user-provided search query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with custom OKLCH design tokens for the AyurGlow theme (light/dark), and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for AyurGlow Secrets displaying a hero section, mission statement, philosophy, and core values grid using Lucide icons and Tailwind styling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish/unpublish state, using confirmation dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid with a sidebar, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post that resolves inline image blob URLs, renders post content with metadata, and includes a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post, handling featured image upload, slug auto-generation, tags, publish options, and error messaging.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating fields from fetched post data and supporting featured image replacement and publish state updates.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Detail page listing four Ayurvedic dandruff and scalp care remedies, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Detail page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies for preventing and reversing premature grey hair, each card showing ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Detail page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair fall treatment remedies with ingredients, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency, displayed as cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: Detail page featuring four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies (oil blends, masks, protein treatments) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency rendered as cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: Displays a hair care page featuring five Ayurvedic oil treatments and hair masks (e.g., Hot Oil Treatment, Brahmi-Amla Oil, Banana-Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, rendered as styled cards with a hero section and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static category landing page for Hair Care that displays a hero section and a grid of subcategory links with descriptions and styling.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Renders a health remedies page with four natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management (Fenugreek Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon) including ingredients, application steps, benefits, and a medical disclaimer.

A styled card-based page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure support with preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions, including a prominent medical disclaimer alert and back navigation to the health remedies section.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Displays four Ayurvedic digestion and gut health remedies (Triphala Churna, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, rendered as styled cards with a hero section and back navigation.

Renders a digestive health remedies page with four Ayurvedic treatments (Triphala Powder, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card layout without hero section or back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Alternative immunity-boosting remedies page using shadcn Card components, featuring a hero section with a back-navigation link and four similar Ayurvedic remedies with structured preparation and benefits lists.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep-aid remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, Almond-Saffron Milk) with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
Alternative stress and sleep solutions page using shadcn Card components with a purple-themed hero section, back-navigation link, and four Ayurvedic remedies including preparation steps and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul, Ginger-Green Tea, Cabbage-Carrot Juice) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP, Stress & Sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page featuring a hero section, category grid, stats, 'why us' highlights, and the three latest published blog posts fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Da: Displays a detailed page of Ayurvedic daily routines (Dinacharya, Abhyanga, Evening Wind-Down) with step-by-step instructions, benefits, and frequency information. Includes a hero section with a back-navigation link to the Lifestyle & Wellness section.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Mo: Renders an Ayurvedic morning rituals page covering oil pulling, tongue scraping, warm lemon water, and self-oil massage, each with steps, benefits, and frequency. Features a hero section linking back to the Lifestyle & Wellness page.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Yo: Presents a Yoga & Meditation page with practices including Pranayama, Surya Namaskar, and guided meditation, each listing steps, benefits, and recommended frequency. Includes a styled hero section with a back link to Lifestyle & Wellness.
frontend/src/pages/LifestyleWellnessPage: Displays the Lifestyle & Wellness category page with a hero section, three subcategory cards (Morning Rituals, Yoga & Meditation, Daily Routines), and an informational blurb about Ayurvedic Dinacharya.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with styled cards covering introduction, automatically collected information, user-provided data, and related policy sections.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays an Acne & Pimples skin care page with four natural remedies (Neem-Turmeric, Tea Tree, Sandalwood-Rose Water, Aloe Vera-Lemon), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Skin Care section.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Renders an Acne Treatment Remedies page listing four Ayurvedic treatments (Neem-Turmeric paste, Tea Tree-Aloe spot treatment, Sandalwood-Rosewater pack, Cinnamon-Honey mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Uses a simple card-based layout without a back-navigation hero section.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Displays a page of Ayurvedic anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Serum, Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Renders a collection of DIY face pack recipes (e.g., Multani Mitti, Besan-Turmeric) categorized by skin type, with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows natural glow remedies using Ayurvedic ingredients (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment) with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Presents a styled page with Card components for pigmentation and dark spot remedies, including a hero section, back navigation link, and detailed remedy cards with ingredients and benefits.
Displays pigmentation reduction remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Orange Peel Mask) with a sun protection warning banner, ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five subcategory cards (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) linking to their routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Renders the Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and styled cards covering agreement terms, website use policy, and other legal sections.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Fat: Displays a list of four Ayurvedic fat-burning drink remedies (e.g., lemon-honey water, green tea with ginger) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Met: Displays three Ayurvedic metabolism-boosting remedy cards (e.g., Triphala-Guggul blend, turmeric tonic) with ingredients, steps, benefits, and usage details.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Wei: Displays three Ayurvedic weight-loss recipes (e.g., moong dal soup, oats-chia breakfast) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
Landing page for the Weight Management category displaying a hero section and three subcategory cards (Fat Burning Drinks, Metabolism Boosters, Healthy Weight Loss Recipes) with links to their respective routes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides utility functions for resolving ExternalBlob image URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values with resolved blob URLs for content display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, animations, and an AyurGlow-specific color palette.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of an Ayurvedic/wellness blog project, including existing features, known issues (blog posts not showing in admin panel), and pending fix requests related to admin panel post visibility and fetching.
